_comment: Cross-language golden for chat/screens/engine blocker ordering (CHAT-070, never-cut policy order). Emitted from the Go engine constants by services/core/internal/policy/order_golden_test.go (run with UPDATE_GOLDEN=1 to regenerate). The Python chat guard (services/llm/tests/test_flows_blockers.py) asserts llm.flows.blockers matches THIS file, so a reorder of internal/policy Stage or internal/cost AllComponents forces both the Go test and the Python test red.
